description: Close-up of two stacks of yellow cardboard packaging containing 6x500ml cans of Cisk Lager beer, Malta's finest original recipe at 4.2% ALC. VOL., wrapped in clear plastic film. Branding prominently features red 'CISK' text, horse logo, 'LAGER original recipe', 'Independent Brewers since 1928', and 'Thwaites' signature. Some cans visible with gold lids. Background includes a supermarket or convenience store setting with colorful wall murals in red, yellow, green abstract designs, wooden shelves, green metal framing, digital display showing numbers, and other stock.
key_elements: objects: yellow packaging, plastic wrap, cans
location_context: Inside a supermarket or grocery store in Malta based on Cisk Lager packaging and colorful store murals.
